titleStmt.title: SII 31.49: original edition by C. A. Padmanabha Sastri and T. S. Ravishankar
No. 49. (A.R. No. B 249 of 1936.) KUMĀRADĒVAM, NIDADAVOLU TALUK, WEST GODAVARI DISTRICT.

summary.p: Pillar in the mukkamaṇḍapa of the Venkaṭēśvara svāmi temple.
It is dated Śaka 1162, Uttarāyasaṁkranti corresponding to December 20, [sunday], 1240 A.D.

Registers the gift of land measuring 5 na of land situated on the southern side of the Yaḍapalli village for maintaining the perpetual lamp at the time of mantra bhōga (recitation of mantras), in the temple of Īshṭakāmiśvaradēva at Vēlpūru by Lōkamadēva, the daughter of Bērāju of Kōna family and the Queen of Malaya Gaṇapatidēva.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śakavarṣaṁbulu 1162 gu nēṁṭṭi Uttarāyaṇa saṁkrāṁtti
nāṁḍu kōnabētrāju kūṁttuṟu malayamu
na gaṇapatidēvanipeṁḍlamu lōkamadēvuḍu tanaĒli
navēlpūra Iṣṭhakāmīśvara dēvaraku maṁtra
bhōgānakunu Akhaṁḍadīpamunaku thakṣiṇa
mu yallapalli polāna beṭina
yina 5 . svadattaṁ paradattaṁ vāyū harēti vasu
ṁdharāṁṣaṣṭhīvarṣa sahasrāṇi viṣṭhāyāṁjā
yalēkrimiḥ .
Digital edition of SII 31.49 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
